global.description: The ad features a clean and modern design with a focus on financial clarity.
global.main_message: Promoting a financial service with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: A small logo in the top left corner featuring the text 'CoinBridge' in a simple font.

elements.label: Main body text
elements.description: A large, bold text in the center stating 'Your money, clearer' with a clean and modern font.

elements.label: Additional body text
elements.description: A smaller text below the main body text that reads 'No hidden fees' in a subtle font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button in the center with the text 'Learn more' in a bold font, designed to attract attention.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Soft, rounded shapes in the background that create a visually appealing layout without distracting from the text.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Additional soft shapes in the background that complement the overall design.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: More rounded shapes in the background, adding depth and interest to the ad.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape in the center that adds a decorative touch to the layout.

elements.label: Main body text
elements.description: The same large, bold text stating 'Your money, clearer' at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: The logo appears again in the top left corner, reinforcing brand identity.

embedding_texts.global_text: CoinBridge, financial services, native format, minimalist with soft shapes, key elements include logo and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top left, the main body text is centered, and the call to action is prominently displayed in the center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: CoinBridge, Your money, clearer, No hidden fees, Learn more
